name: Inuzuka Moritaka
description: A proud warrior of the Canine Eight and a member of the Kendo Team. He is a Canis therian transient who is also a student of Shinjuku Academy. He often trains alongside Kengo. He is also recognised as a warrior gladiator by the Ikebukuro Guild, and thus can introduce new members to the guild. Despite this, he does not spend much time at the Ikebukuro Colosseum, only going there with Kengo occasionally. There are some there that he does not get along with.
creator: Kaowheb
